mapper.select:
select distinct e.id as examId, e.title as examTitle, 1 as neededMark from t_exam e
e.is_deleted = 0 and e.saq_count > 0
and ( e.user_id = #{userId} or e.id in ( select eg.exam_id from t_exam_grade eg join t_user_grade ug on ug.g_id = eg.grade_id where ug.u_id = #{userId} and ug.is_deleted = 0 ) )
and e.title like concat('%',#{examName},'%')
order by e.id desc

select e.id as id,e.title as title,e.exam_duration as examDuration,e.passed_score as passedScore, e.gross_score as grossScore,e.max_count as maxCount,e.user_id as userId,e.certificate_id as certificateId, e.radio_count as radioCount,e.radio_score as radioScore,e.multi_count as multi_count,e.multi_score as multiScore, e.judge_count as judgeCount,e.judge_score as judgeScore,e.saq_count as saqCount,e.saq_score as saqScore, e.start_time as startTime,e.end_time as endTime,e.create_time as createTime,u.user_time as userTime,u.user_score as userScore, u.limit_time as limitTime, u.ai_graded as aiGraded from t_exam e join t_user_exams_score as u on u.exam_id = e.id where u.user_id = #{userId} and u.whether_mark in (-1,1) and e.is_deleted = 0
and e.title like concat('%',#{examName},'%')
order by u.create_time
ASC
DESC

select e.id as id,e.title as title,e.exam_duration as examDuration,e.passed_score as passedScore, e.gross_score as grossScore,e.max_count as maxCount,e.user_id as userId,e.certificate_id as certificateId, e.radio_count as radioCount,e.radio_score as radioScore,e.multi_count as multi_count,e.multi_score as multiScore, e.judge_count as judgeCount,e.judge_score as judgeScore,e.saq_count as saqCount,e.saq_score as saqScore, e.start_time as startTime,e.end_time as endTime,e.create_time as createTime,u.user_time as userTime,u.user_score as userScore, u.limit_time as limitTime from t_exam e join t_user_exams_score as u on u.exam_id = e.id where e.user_id = #{userId} and u.whether_mark in (-1,1)
and e.title like concat('%',#{examName},'%')
order by u.create_time
ASC
DESC

select e.id as id,e.title as title,e.exam_duration as examDuration,e.passed_score as passedScore, e.gross_score as grossScore,e.max_count as maxCount,e.user_id as userId,e.certificate_id as certificateId, e.radio_count as radioCount,e.radio_score as radioScore,e.multi_count as multi_count,e.multi_score as multiScore, e.judge_count as judgeCount,e.judge_score as judgeScore,e.saq_count as saqCount,e.saq_score as saqScore, e.start_time as startTime,e.end_time as endTime,e.create_time as createTime,u.user_time as userTime,u.user_score as userScore, u.limit_time as limitTime from t_exam e join t_user_exams_score as u on u.exam_id = e.id where u.whether_mark in (-1,1)
and e.title like concat('%',#{examName},'%')
order by u.create_time
ASC
DESC
